title: StaffCraft: Evolution
description: StaffCraft: Evolution adds 10+ unique magical staffs with insane abilities. Freeze enemies, bend reality, summon meteors, control the ocean and more! Collect shards from mobs, craft powerful staffs, and battle friends in the arena with the /vs system. ⚔️
body:
# StaffCraft: Evolution

## About 
StaffCraft: Evolution is a magic combat mod that adds 10+ powerful staffs and their corresponding shards to Minecraft. Every staff is uniquely overpowered with active abilities, passive effects, and special G-key powers.
## DON'T FORGET USE G 
## Staffs & Shards
Each staff requires a specific shard to craft. Shards drop from specific mobs with set drop chances:

-  Ice Staff — drops from Stray (15%)
-  Blazebringer — drops from Blaze (3%)
-  Void Staff — drops from Enderman (4%)
-  Reality Staff — drops from Evoker (15%)
-  Warden Staff — drops from Warden (100%)
-  Eclipse Staff — drops from Phantom (4%)
-  Spider Staff — drops from Spider (1.5%)
-  Glitch Staff — drops from Witch (3%)
-  TNT Staff — drops from Wither (100%)
-  Ocean Staff — drops from Drowned (3%)
-  Teleport Sword — drops from Enderman (4%)
-  Time Staff - drops from Enderman (5%)
-  Terra Staff - drops from Iron Golem (5%)
-  Reaper Staff — drops from Wither Skeleton (3%)

## Features
- Every staff has Right Click, Left Click, and G-key abilities
- Passive effects while holding the staff
- VS System: use /vs to challenge players to arena battles
- Kit selection system with unique loadouts per staff
- Full Turkish and English language support

## Language Support
This mod fully supports both English and Turkish.
